systems.system_notes: Current cephalomedullary nailing platform for hip fracture fixation across stable and unstable proximal femur patterns.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker materials describe a single integrated instrument platform across the Gamma4 hip fracture nail family.

components.component_notes: Official Gamma4 materials describe the trochanteric nail for hip fracture fixation.
Official Gamma4 materials describe the intermediate nail within the hip fracture nailing platform.
Official Gamma4 materials describe the long nail for proximal femur and associated shaft fracture patterns.
Official Gamma4 materials describe cephalic lag screw options including the RC lag screw expansion.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Gamma4 materials define the nail families and lag screw options but do not expose the complete implant code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure or IFU pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
